description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden filing cabinet with a warm, reddish-brown finish and a smooth, flat top surface. The front features four vertically stacked drawers, each with a wide, integrated recessed handle that runs horizontally across the upper edge of each drawer face. The cabinet's sides are plain and flat, showing the wood grain pattern, while the back is a solid, unadorned wood panel. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a modern, minimalist design. There are no visible label holders or lock mechanisms on the drawers, suggesting a simple, functional style. This type of cabinet is commonly used for organized document storage in professional or home office environments.
description: A tall, four-drawer wooden filing cabinet with recessed handles and a smooth, reddish-brown finish. It has a modern, minimalist design and is built for organized document storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing four stacked drawers with wide, recessed handles and a smooth wood finish.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's slim profile and the subtle contours of the drawer fronts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned wood panel with visible wood grain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to the other side, showing the cabinet's slimness and handle contours.
